name: agent-architecture-skills
description: Reusable architecture skills for Codex and Claude Code agent system design, review, and refactor.

interface.shortDescription: Architecture skills for designing and reviewing agent systems.
interface.longDescription: A reusable skill set for Codex and Claude Code covering runtime kernels, surface adapters, protocol/tooling boundaries, and multi-agent orchestration.
defaultPrompt: Review the architecture of this agent platform end to end.
How should tool results be reinjected into the next turn?
How should a manager-worker system split task and worker state?
